hero.eyebrow: Custom woodwork for homes and projects
hero.headline: Custom woodwork shaped for the room it lives in
hero.subheading: Handcrafted furniture, doors, and fitted pieces with Moroccan joinery and modern finishes.

home.serviceCard1: Cabinets, islands, and shelving built around the actual room.
home.serviceCard2: Wardrobes, bed frames, and bedside pieces sized to fit cleanly.
home.serviceCard3: Shelves, tables, and media units with a calm, practical finish.
home.serviceCard4: Entry and interior doors made with measured joinery and balanced proportions.
home.serviceCard5: Wood objects, panels, and accents shaped for specific interiors.
home.serviceCard6: Benches and garden pieces selected for use outside.
home.serviceCard7: Repair and restoration for heirloom pieces and older furniture.
home.serviceCard8: One off pieces designed from your measurements and priorities.
home.processIntro: Clear steps, direct communication, and a finish that matches the plan.

about.title: About Gamra Wood Craft
about.heroSubtitle: Heritage Moroccan woodworking shaped with modern design.
about.description: We build custom pieces from measured plans, selected timber, and finishes matched to the room.
about.storyP1: Gamra Wood Craft was founded with a simple vision: to create exceptional wooden furniture that combines traditional Moroccan craftsmanship with contemporary design. What started as a small workshop in the heart of Gamra has grown into a respected name in custom furniture.
about.storyP2: For over a decade, we have been dedicated to perfecting our craft, working with premium materials, and building lasting relationships with our clients. Every piece we create tells a story of passion, skill, and commitment to excellence.
about.storyP3: Our artisans carry forward techniques passed down through generations, infusing each piece with authentic character and uncompromising quality.
about.valueCraftDesc: Every detail matters. We take pride in the quality of our work, from the selection of materials to the final finish.
about.valueSustainDesc: We source our materials responsibly and create pieces built to last generations, reducing waste and environmental impact.
about.valueCollabDesc: We listen to our clients and work closely with you to bring your vision to life, ensuring complete satisfaction.
about.process1Desc: We meet with you to understand your needs, style preferences, and space requirements.
about.process2Desc: Our designers create custom sketches and plans tailored specifically to your project.
about.process3Desc: Our artisans hand-craft your piece using traditional techniques and premium materials.
about.process4Desc: We ensure perfect installation and delivery, with full support and care.
about.teamSubtitle: Our team of skilled craftspeople brings decades of combined experience to every project.
about.teamRole1Desc: With 20+ years of experience, leading our workshop with exceptional skill and vision.
about.teamRole2Desc: Builds relationships, communicates with people, and helps bring new clients to the workshop.
about.teamRole3Desc: Designs and develops this website, improves user experience, and keeps everything running smoothly.
about.whyLeft1Desc: Every piece is handcrafted specifically for you, ensuring it perfectly fits your space and style.
about.whyLeft2Desc: We source the finest woods and materials, ensuring durability and beauty that stands the test of time.
about.whyLeft3Desc: Our artisans combine traditional techniques with modern design sensibilities for exceptional results.
about.whyRight1Desc: We work closely with you throughout the entire process, from concept to delivery and beyond.
about.whyRight2Desc: Quality handmade furniture at fair prices, with transparent communication on costs and timelines.
about.whyRight3Desc: We stand behind our work with ongoing support, maintenance advice, and restoration services.
about.ctaDescription: Let's create a piece that fits the room and the brief.
about.card1Description: Every piece starts with the space it needs to fit.
about.card2Description: Cabinets, wardrobes, doors, and fitted storage built for the brief.
about.card3Description: Clean joinery, calm finishes, and details that hold up over time.

hassan.label: Master Woodworker
hassan.description: He is dedicated to preserving the soul of the forest. With over 20 years of expertise, he combines traditional joinery with intricate hand-carving to create heirloom pieces.

nadia.label: Lead Strategist & Logistics
nadia.description: She bridges the communication between vision and craft. She ensures every client relationship is managed with precision and is responsible for the delivery of the country.

ibrahim.label: Digital Systems Director
ibrahim.description: He is the architect of the digital presence. He developed the web platform, manages the e-commerce engine, and optimizes all AdSense revenue streams.

testimonials.title: What clients say
testimonials.heroSubtitle: A few words from recent projects, from first measurements to final installation.
testimonials.card1Quote: The wardrobes were measured perfectly, installed cleanly, and the finish matched the room exactly.
testimonials.card2Quote: They turned a difficult kitchen layout into a practical workspace that feels calm and well built.
testimonials.card3Quote: The team was careful on site, and the doors feel solid, balanced, and finished with real care.
testimonials.ctaText: Share your measurements and we will help shape the right solution for your space.

services.title: Our Services
services.heroSubtitle: We specialize in custom wood furniture for every space
services.description: We make custom wood pieces for kitchens, bedrooms, doors, and fitted interiors.
services.kitchenDescription1: Transform your kitchen with custom-built furniture. From sleek modern cabinets to traditional designs, we create functional and beautiful pieces that maximize your space.
services.kitchenDescription2: Our kitchen solutions include custom islands, cabinetry, shelving, and built-in seating.
services.bedroomDescription1: Create your perfect sanctuary with bespoke bedroom furniture. From elegant wardrobes to comfortable bed frames and nightstands, we design pieces that reflect your style.
services.bedroomDescription2: Each bedroom project is customized to fit your space perfectly and match your aesthetic preferences.
services.livingDescription1: Design the heart of your home with custom living room furniture. Floating shelves, entertainment units, coffee tables, and more-all crafted to elevate your space.
services.livingDescription2: We work with you to create pieces that are both beautiful and functional for modern living.
services.doorsDescription1: Make a statement with handcrafted wooden doors. From intricate designs to minimalist styles, our doors are works of art that enhance any entryway.
services.doorsDescription2: Each door is built to last with premium materials and expert craftsmanship.
services.decorDescription1: Add personality to your home with unique wooden decorative pieces. Hand-carved boxes, sculptures, frames, and more that showcase traditional artistry.
services.decorDescription2: Perfect as gifts or to elevate your home decor with authentic craftsmanship.
services.outdoorDescription1: Enjoy your outdoor space with weather-resistant wood furniture. Benches, tables, and seating made with premium materials that withstand the elements.
services.outdoorDescription2: Our outdoor pieces combine durability with natural beauty for timeless appeal.
services.restorationDescription1: Restore antique and heirloom furniture to its original beauty. Our expert artisans carefully repair, refinish, and restore wooden pieces with authentic techniques.
services.restorationDescription2: Preserve your family treasures and give old pieces new life.
services.customDescription1: Have a unique vision? We create fully custom furniture tailored to your exact specifications. From concept to completion, we work closely with you every step of the way.
services.customDescription2: No project is too ambitious-we love bringing bold ideas to life.
services.ctaDescription: Let's collaborate on your custom furniture project

portfolio.title: Our Portfolio
portfolio.description: Selected pieces from kitchens, wardrobes, doors, and fitted storage.
portfolio.ctaDescription: Let's discuss your custom furniture project

process.title: Our Process
process.step1Description: We review the room, the use, and the finish you want.
process.step2Description: We shape the layout and dimensions to the actual space.
process.step3Description: The piece is built with joinery, sanding, and finishing by hand.
process.step4Description: We deliver and install with the final fit checked on site.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: Tell us what you need, and we will shape the first proposal around it.
contact.name: Name
contact.mondayFriday: Monday to Friday: 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM
